title: SkyBlock
description: A custom Skyblock modpack focused on progression, automation, and quality-of-life improvements for a smooth and challenging gameplay experience.
body:
![image 1.1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9c0d152059e1bb8b89f91311f126ae5559b64055.png)

A Skyblock data pack that transforms Minecraft into a survival challenge on a tiny floating island. It includes custom islands, balanced resource generation, progression goals, and optional challenges.
